_readme: Ledger of judicious-cutting decisions + budget overrides for the coverage audit.
defaults: budget applied to every emblem (see coverage_lib.DEFAULTS for meanings).
emblems: per-emblem overrides keyed by emblem number as a string.
flat: [[x0,y0,x1,y1], ...] normalised rectangles of engraving that is INTENTIONALLY
left flat on the backing (motto banner, epigram text, plate border). Excluded
from both the coverage denominator and the gap search — declaring a region flat
is you certifying 'this is backing, not a missing cutout'.
any DEFAULTS key (min_coverage, max_gap_frac, ...) overrides the budget for that emblem.
Full-page plates (emblems 00-09, 1200x1434) carry motto + epigram text: add flat bands
for them here. Square picture-crops (10+) are all-picture, so whole-plate coverage applies.
